nasb.text: But you shall serve the Lord your God, and He will bless your bread and your water; and I will remove sickness from your midst.

esv.text: You shall serve the Lord your God, and he will bless your bread and your water, and I will take sickness away from among you.

cnv.text: 你們要事奉耶和華你們的　神，他就必賜福你的糧和你的水，我也必從你們中間除去疾病。

ccb.text: 你们要事奉你们的上帝耶和华，我必赐给你日用的饮食，使你们身体健康，不受疾病的侵害，
